chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1774 of 2021 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 01.12.2025 Mr. Noor Muhammad Soomro, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner stands redressed, as he has received a post-dated cheque dated 08.12.2025. In view thereof, he does not wish to press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
